objective: Close F-0144 by composing each currently answerable organization training version with the signed-in employee's persisted answer lifecycle, organization display name and submitted score, and by adding an object-authorized GET path that restores only that employee's in-progress answer snapshot. Preserve the existing advanced organization authorization, current organization scope, single-submit lifecycle and raw-answer privacy boundaries without schema, migration, persistent database execution or entitlement expansion.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
new role, entitlement, organization scope, quota or default capability
cross-employee answers, admin raw-answer access or answer export
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApi: StudentOrganizationTrainingPage consumes visible-list, derives the primary action from employeeAnswerStatus and currently initializes every form empty. It must load the authenticated employee's in-progress draft before enabling continuation and keep submitted rows on the existing readonly-summary path.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: The existing employee session resolver supplies employeePublicId, currentOrganizationPublicId and effective advanced org_auth. The new GET reuses the same context, visible version resolver and own-answer resolver, but the service accepts only an in_progress answer owned by that employee and version.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: The runtime visible-list query already joins employee, user, employee_org_auth, org_auth and organization but does not join the unique version+employee answer. It must left join that exact self answer once and project status, score and organization name without widening scope or exposing answer items in the list.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing organization_training_answer has a unique version+employee index and persisted revision, answer_item_snapshot, status, score and submitted_at. Existing organization and version rows provide the display and scope facts. No schema or migration source is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Repository, service, route and employee UI RED cases cover no-answer, in-progress refresh recovery, submitted result discovery, cross-employee/version denial, no mutation and preserved retry semantics. Existing P0 RC-08 regressions are pre-allowlisted.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: CT-REQ-019 and CT-REQ-036, D15, UC-ORGADVEMP-011/012, the advanced organization training module/story and ADR-007 require save/restore, one-submit, own-result discovery and service-enforced advanced organization authorization.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No historical submitted-after-transfer read model, entitlement expansion, admin answer access, schema, migration, real database, dependency, Provider, deployment or mechanism change. F-0146 remains separate.
